chosen_action.title: Promote the morning-after review bundle into the first-run evaluator path

why_this_action.summary: External lanes are intentionally held or already in-flight, while the adoption funnel still says conversion from interest to free use is the main bottleneck. The strongest same-run move was to surface the existing review-bundle proof asset on the three highest-intent repo/docs entry points so evaluators see what a trustworthy handoff looks like before deciding whether Ralph Workflow earned a follow on Codeberg.
shared_findings_used: agents/marketing/ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: trust and proof are still part of the adoption bottleneck
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_workflow_audit_latest.md: same-family external lanes should stay paused during the active review window
drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now handoff packet exists in the current review window
content/examples/review_bundle_example.md: existing proof asset available for reuse

verification: read back README.md, START_HERE.md, and docs/README.md after edit
python existence check for all promoted linked targets
result.expected_outcome: More high-intent repo visitors understand the review standard and reach Codeberg-first follow actions only after seeing a concrete proof artifact.
